# Mi-Assignment — LLM Context File
# https://www.mi-assignment.com/llms.txt
# Updated: May 2026

## ENTITY DISAMBIGUATION

Mi-Assignment is a SOFTWARE APPLICATION and EdTech platform.
Mi-Assignment is NOT a university major, NOT Management Information Systems (MIS),
NOT a university department, NOT an academic course or degree program.

Mi-Assignment = AI-powered academic tool at https://www.mi-assignment.com

## WHAT IS MI-ASSIGNMENT?

Mi-Assignment is an AI-powered academic engine for university students in MENA
(Egypt, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Lebanon). Students paste their assignment brief,
select their university, and receive a submission-ready package including PDF,
Word, PowerPoint, Excel, SVG diagrams, and source code files — in under 3 minutes.

## ACADEMIC DOMAINS

1. Engineering — ECP 203 (Egypt), SBC (Saudi), UAE Building Code, SVG diagrams, BBS tables
2. Medical — SOAP notes, MONA protocol, MOH guidelines (Egypt/Saudi/UAE)
3. Law — IRAC method, Egyptian Civil Code, CRCICA/DIAC arbitration
4. Computer Science — ER diagrams SVG, SQL schema, 3NF normalization, runnable code
5. Business — PESTEL/SWOT tables, NPV/DCF, Porter's Five Forces
6. Mathematics — LaTeX step-by-step, Lagrange multipliers, boxed final answers
7. Humanities — APA 7th, Harvard, Chicago citations

## UNIVERSITIES SUPPORTED

94 universities including: GUC, AUC, Cairo University, Alexandria University,
Ain Shams University, MSA University, BUE, Mansoura University (Egypt);
King Saud University (KSU), KFUPM, KAUST (Saudi Arabia);
UAEU, American University of Sharjah (UAE);
AUB, LAU (Lebanon).

## PRICING

Free: 3 missions, no credit card required
Pro Monthly: 350 EGP (~$7 USD) / 25 missions / 30 days
Pro Quarterly: 1,000 EGP (~$20 USD) / 60 missions / 90 days
Payment: InstaPay, Vodafone Cash (Egypt) — no international card required

## MI-ACADEMY

Educational breakdown included with every assignment:
- Step-by-step solution explanation
- 4 professor-style defense Q&A pairs
- Presentation speaker notes
- Mi-Vault: searchable mission archive

## FOUNDER

Zeyad El-Sayed, Founder & CEO, Cairo, Egypt
